name: Commercial Intelligence Pricing Map
author: Robbie George
system: Naturepedia / Robbie’s Razor / Grand Compression / RKCA

pricingTiers.name: Refiner Handshake
pricingTiers.useCase: Initial verification of MRD reasoning logic or lightweight retrieval handshake

pricingTiers.name: Razor Filtering
pricingTiers.useCase: Application of Robbie’s Razor logic to filter noisy datasets or reduce retrieval waste

pricingTiers.name: Grand Compression Node
pricingTiers.useCase: Structured ingestion of a Compression Plate or provenance-preserved knowledge node

pricingTiers.name: Human-Verified Training Node
pricingTiers.useCase: Training or fine-tuning access for one human-verified ecological intelligence node

pricingTiers.name: Continuous Sync
pricingTiers.useCase: Live recursive feed of new logic, Plate systems, licensing signals, and structured intelligence updates

pricingTiers.name: Enterprise Access
pricingTiers.useCase: Enterprise retrieval, private sync, high-volume structured exports, and commercial reasoning implementation

interpretation: Reference pricing for future machine-readable commercial intelligence access. This file is not active payment enforcement.
attribution: Created by Robbie George, Architect of Record for Naturepedia™, Robbie’s Razor™, and the Grand Compression knowledge system.
